name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: Dallas, TX TitleMax Title Loans at 4848 Lemmon Ave Suite 104 offers fast title loans and payday cash.
description_long:
TitleMax Title Loans at 4848 Lemmon Ave, Suite 104 in Dallas, TX is a standalone title loan storefront serving the Dallas area. The location operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours 10 AM to 4 PM, and closed on Sundays. This Dallas storefront specializes in quick title loans and payday advances for customers needing fast cash.

This Dallas location offers title loans secured by your vehicle and payday advances at competitive rates. Contact the Dallas storefront at +1 214-414-0494 for rates, terms, and to apply. The team can walk you through the documentation requirements and get you funded quickly.

If you're in Dallas and need emergency cash against your car title or for a payday advance, TitleMax at Lemmon Ave is open during extended hours to accommodate working Dallasites. Bring your government ID, proof of income, and your vehicle title to complete the application. Same-day funding is available for approved applications.
pros: Accepts most credit types, not dependent solely on credit score
Keep driving your vehicle while using title as collateral
Flexible line of credit allows partial withdrawals over time
Quick approval process with minimal documentation
5.00/5 star average rating from 481+ customer reviews across location
Bilingual staff available at Memphis location
Multiple nearby locations in Memphis area for convenience
cons: Vehicle title used as collateral creates repossession risk if payments missed
Title loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional personal loans (rates not disclosed on website)
Unsecured personal loans limited to 11 states only—not nationwide availability
Website does not disclose specific APR or rate ranges, making cost comparison difficult
Requires clear vehicle title, excluding customers with outstanding loans on their vehicle
best_for: Consumers with poor credit history who need quick emergency cash and own a vehicle outright
Individuals needing flexible access to emergency funds via a line of credit structure
Memphis-area residents with short-term cash needs and no time for traditional loan approval processes
diagnosis: TitleMax is best for Memphis-area residents or customers in their 11-state service area who need emergency cash quickly and own a vehicle outright. The primary caveat is that title loans carry higher interest rates and repossession risk—this should only be considered when traditional lending is unavailable and the borrower is confident in their ability to repay.
services: Title pledge loans using vehicle title as collateral
Flex line of credit secured by vehicle title
Unsecured personal lines of credit (online and in-store)
Online loan application and management portal
Line of credit management with flexible withdrawal options
Competitive rate assessment based on vehicle value and repayment ability
meta_description: TitleMax Title Loans at 4848 Lemmon Ave, Dallas, TX. Fast title loans and payday cash with same-day funding available.
